_comment: Canonical wiki-fetch sub-agent return shape. The validator in _wiki_fetch_contract.py asserts every field is present with the right type and the result fits within the 4000-token cap.

valid_canonical.title: Stripe API Reference
key-sentences: Stripe uses API keys to authenticate requests.
Errors return JSON with a type and code.
List endpoints support cursor-based pagination via starting_after.
